greeting_prepared.evidence: Agent greeted professionally and identified herself.

contact_info.evidence: Agent confirmed email and phone number.

source_discovery.evidence: Agent asked how client found the company.

first_time_customer.evidence: Agent asked if this was client's first interaction.

advertised_offer.evidence: Agent mentioned pricing but did not reference a specific advertised offer.

airline_preferences.evidence: Agent asked about airline preferences and miles.

product_presentation.evidence: Agent presented business class features and value proposition.

online_prices.evidence: Agent asked if client checked online prices.

fare_guarantee.evidence: Agent offered fare guarantee with $50 beat promise.

objection_handling.evidence: Agent handled the discussion-with-wife objection well.

next_call_scheduling.evidence: Agent scheduled follow-up call for 3 PM tomorrow.

urgency_creation.evidence: Agent mentioned seats filling up and advance purchase benefits.

additional_assistance.evidence: Agent offered hotel and ground transportation help.

thank_you_closing.evidence: Agent thanked caller for calling Buy Business Class.

straight_line_system.evidence: Agent maintained focus on the sale throughout the call.

positive_tone.evidence: Agent maintained upbeat and professional tone.

authenticity.evidence: Agent responses were genuine and appropriate.

pace_matching.evidence: Agent spoke slightly fast at times.

overall_assessment: Excellent first call. The agent demonstrated strong sales skills, built good rapport, and followed the recommended call structure. Minor areas for improvement include referencing specific website offers and matching client's speaking pace.
strengths: Thorough discovery process covering dates, airports, airlines, and budget
Strong value presentation with fare guarantee and urgency creation
improvements: Reference specific advertised offers from the website
Match client's speaking pace more closely
Could have explored additional travel needs earlier
